drivers.notes: 6" Unibody cone with Active Ridge Technology (ART) surround

description.en: 2.5-way Founder floorstander — AL-MAC ceramic tweeter, AL-MAG midrange and twin 152 mm CARBON-X Unibody woofers with ART surround in a faceted ported cabinet. Low-frequency extension to 28 Hz (DIN); 90 dB anechoic sensitivity.
description.es: Floorstander Founder de 2.5 vías — tweeter cerámico AL-MAC, midrange AL-MAG y dos woofers CARBON-X Unibody de 152 mm con suspensión ART en gabinete facetado con puerto. Extensión de graves hasta 28 Hz (DIN); 90 dB de sensibilidad anecoica.
